title: Document missing modules in ARCHITECTURE.md — close 85% → 90% gap
description:
ARCHITECTURE.md has been significantly updated (store docs, embed docs, adapters section, CLI section, package entry). Remaining items:

1. [STALE] Known limitation #5 (line 627) says memory.js is 待实现 but it IS implemented with 26 passing tests. Remove or update this limitation.
2. [MINOR] profiler.js + latency-log.js have overview mention but no formal API section — add brief entries.
3. [MINOR] sense.js full API (init/on/start/stop/detect etc.) could use a more complete listing.

Item 1 is the critical blocker for closing the architecture gap. Items 2-3 are minor polish.
